bookstubeHome.heroTitle: Free illustrated books for curious kids
bookstubeHome.heroSubtitle: Discover short, beautiful books about science, history, nature, emotions, technology, and the world — made for reading together.
bookstubeHome.heroTrust: No login needed. Just choose a book and read.
bookstubeHome.parentTitle: A free library for meaningful reading time
bookstubeHome.parentText: BooksTube helps parents and children discover illustrated books about the world — from science and history to emotions, friendship, and imagination.
bookstubeHome.ctaTitle: Want a book made just for your child?
bookstubeHome.ctaText: With Books Giant, you can create a personalized illustrated book from your child's idea, photo, interests, or a topic they love.

tagLibrary.title: Tag library management
tagLibrary.libHelp: Here you can create libraries based on tags you entered in the books. This allows the creation of libraries on different topics and even one library containing different topics. These libraries can be shared and even embedded on a website such as the school website.
tagLibrary.noTags: There are no tags in the library. Please select at least one tag.
tagLibrary.addTagHelp: Adding the tag to the library
tagLibrary.saveAs: Save as a new tag library
tagLibrary.shelvesHelp: Books on shelves or without shelves
tagLibrary.noTagsYet: There are no books tagged in school yet
tagLibrary.groupByHelp: How to arrange the books on the shelves

meta.ogDescFamily: Let children express themselves through writing
meta.title: Books Giant
meta.description: Books Giant is an online platform that enables users to create beautiful digital books. The book editor is intuitive and easy to use, encouraging children to unleash their imagination and express themselves through writing stories. You'll be amazed to see the creativity of your child. it is a great tool for school teachers to teach language skills. The digital books can be shared and printed at high quality
meta.tagLibraryTitle: Books written by kids — Books Giant Library
meta.tagLibraryDesc: Real books written and illustrated by kids. Read, get inspired — and create your own book.
meta.bookstubeTitle: BooksTube — Free Illustrated Children's Books Library
meta.bookstubeDesc: Read free illustrated children's books about science, history, nature, emotions, technology, and more. A free online library for parents, teachers, and curious kids.
